Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 6, 2026

DaysPop ("we", "our", or "the app") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data DaysPop collects and how it is used.

Data We Collect

DaysPop does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to external servers. All of your countdown data is stored locally on your device.

  • Countdown events — names, dates, emojis, and theme preferences are stored on-device only.
  • Photos — if you choose a custom photo background, the image is stored locally on your device. It is never uploaded or shared.
  • Purchase data — in-app purchases are handled entirely by Apple through StoreKit. We do not have access to your payment information.

Analytics & Tracking

DaysPop does not use any third-party analytics, tracking, or advertising SDKs. We do not track your usage or behavior.

Third-Party Services

The only third-party service used is Apple's App Store for processing in-app purchases. Apple's privacy policy governs that interaction.

Data Sharing

We do not sell, share, or transfer any user data to third parties. Period.

Children's Privacy

DaysPop is suitable for all ages (rated 4+). We do not knowingly collect any data from children or any other users.

Changes to This Policy

If we update this policy, the changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

Contact

If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at support@dayspop.com.
